creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: madpilot
Date: Wed Jul 18 20:26:20 2012
New Revision: 301123
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301123

Log:
  - Update to 0.4.2
  
  PR:		ports/169940
  Submitted by:	Jason Bacon <jwbacon@tds.net>A (maintainer)
  Approved by:	tabthorpe (mentor)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/desktop-installer/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/desktop-installer/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile	Wed Jul 18 20:23:09 2012	(r301122)
+++ head/sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile	Wed Jul 18 20:26:20 2012	(r301123)
@@ -6,10 +6,10 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	desktop-installer
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.2
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
-MASTER_SITES=	http://personalpages.tds.net/~jwbacon/Ports/distfiles/ \
-		http://acadix.biz/Ports/distfiles/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://acadix.biz/Ports/distfiles/ \
+		http://personalpages.tds.net/~jwbacon/Ports/distfiles/
 
 MAINTAINER=	jwbacon@tds.net
 COMMENT=	Quickly configure a FreeBSD desktop system
@@ -18,15 +18,12 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	auto-append-line:${PORTSDIR
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 
-MAN1=		${PORTNAME}.1 amd-setup.1
+MAN1=		${PORTNAME}.1
 
 do-install:
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/sbin
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/amd-setup ${PREFIX}/sbin
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/Doc/${PORTNAME}.man \
 		${PREFIX}/man/man1/${PORTNAME}.1
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/Doc/amd-setup.man \
-		${PREFIX}/man/man1/amd-setup.1
 	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
 	${CP} -r ${WRKSRC}/Data/* ${DATADIR}
 	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}/Scripts

Modified: head/sysutils/desktop-installer/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/desktop-installer/distinfo	Wed Jul 18 20:23:09 2012	(r301122)
+++ head/sysutils/desktop-installer/distinfo	Wed Jul 18 20:26:20 2012	(r301123)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (desktop-installer-0.4.1.tar.gz) = 7c6e9d18d1212535158be9d7c3c144436ebc26b93119642924da66e5ed7e4e52
-SIZE (desktop-installer-0.4.1.tar.gz) = 266940
+SHA256 (desktop-installer-0.4.2.tar.gz) = 27e113aee0601e930102371c14328448a79ebf6ee8406c4bc2f35117c17ab7d7
+SIZE (desktop-installer-0.4.2.tar.gz) = 266712

Modified: head/sysutils/desktop-installer/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/desktop-installer/pkg-plist	Wed Jul 18 20:23:09 2012	(r301122)
+++ head/sysutils/desktop-installer/pkg-plist	Wed Jul 18 20:26:20 2012	(r301123)
@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
-sbin/amd-setup
 sbin/desktop-installer
 %%DATADIR%%/90-vboxguest.fdi
 %%DATADIR%%/Gnome/Xsession
@@ -25,6 +24,7 @@ sbin/desktop-installer
 %%DATADIR%%/XFCE4/bsd_background.jpg
 %%DATADIR%%/XFCE4/xdmshutdown
 %%DATADIR%%/XFCE4/xinitrc
+%%DATADIR%%/epdfview-options
 %%DATADIR%%/fstab
 %%DATADIR%%/gcc45/Makefile
 %%DATADIR%%/gcc45/distinfo
@@ -42,6 +42,7 @@ sbin/desktop-installer
 %%DATADIR%%/splash.bmp
 %%DATADIR%%/todo
 %%DATADIR%%/vbox
+%%DATADIR%%/xfce4-print-options
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/gcc45/files
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/gcc45
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/XFCE4
